{
  IPaymentStrategy.PaymentStrategyKeys.g.cs:
using System;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public static partial class PaymentStrategyKeys
    {
        public const string Alipay = "alipay";
        public const string Wechat = "wechat";
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterStrategyGenerator
,
  IPaymentStrategy.PaymentStrategyRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public static partial class PaymentStrategyRegistry
    {
        private static readonly IStrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.IPaymentStrategy> _instance = new StrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.IPaymentStrategy>(new Dictionary<string, global::TestAssembly.IPaymentStrategy> { ["alipay"] = new global::TestAssembly.AlipayPayment(), ["wechat"] = new global::TestAssembly.WechatPayment() });
        public static IStrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.IPaymentStrategy> Instance
        {
            get
            {
                return _instance;
            }
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterStrategyGenerator

}
